title: Update Merge Button Label to 'Merge and Save to Metrics Glossary'
story: As a DataTools Pro user merging metrics in the Analyst, I want the merge button to clearly state 'Merge and Save to Metrics Glossary', so that I understand the merge action will save the result to my glossary.
description: The merge button label in the Metrics Analyst pop-out should be updated to read 'Merge and Save to Metrics Glossary' to clearly communicate what the action does.
acceptance_criteria: Merge button label reads 'Merge and Save to Metrics Glossary'
Button label is visible and not truncated in the pop-out modal
ux_changes: Updated the merge button label from the previous text to 'Merge and Save to Metrics Glossary' in the Metrics Analyst pop-out.
comment_summary: Developer updated the button label and pushed to staging for review.
